rationale: Added supporting type stubs (Ordering, KeyTrait, VerusClone, StrictlyOrderedVec with v: Seq<K>). Proof case-splits on r1<r2 vs r2<r1, uses Seq::insert_ensures + K::cmp_properties() to derive sortedness contradictions, then proves r1==r2, post1@==post2@ via extensional equality, then post1.v==post2.v, then struct equality. verus exits 0 with 1 verified, 0 errors.
